_meta.purpose: P&L projection template. AI fills values from sector JSON + user inputs. Output 12-month + 3-scenario projections.

instructions_for_ai.step1: Collect user inputs: sector, sub-model, Amman region, starting capital, team size.
instructions_for_ai.step3: Fill this template using sector benchmark RANGES — Realistic scenario as base.
instructions_for_ai.step4: Apply scenario_multipliers.json to generate Conservative, Realistic, Optimistic.
instructions_for_ai.step5: Flag any triggered red flags from red_flag_rules.json.
instructions_for_ai.step6: Output 12-month table + summary metrics in user's language (Arabic or English).
instructions_for_ai.rounding: Round JOD to nearest 10. Percentages to 1 decimal place.
instructions_for_ai.currency: JOD unless user specifies USD (1 JOD ≈ 1.41 USD)

userInputs.sector: REQUIRED — food_and_beverage | retail_ecommerce | professional_services | tech_software | education_training | health_wellness
userInputs.subModel: REQUIRED — e.g. cloud_kitchen | instagram_store | solo_freelancer | saas | gym | online_course

keyMetrics.breakEvenMonth: Month N where cumulative profit first turns positive

rampUpCurve.note: Always apply ramp — no business launches at full capacity.

monthlyTable.rows: Month 1 through Month 12, for each of 3 scenarios

outputFormat.actionItems: 1–3 specific recommendations targeting the weakest metric in the Realistic scenario.
